content: 2024–2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be redesigned to treat the agent’s own unstructured search-based partial knowledge (the sparse, incomplete topic context in this example) as a retrievable curiosity-triggering memory corpus, rather than discarded noise. This framing turns incomplete domain context into a self-supervised source of active learning query candidates that align with curiosity-driven reinforcement learning’s core goal of driving exploration of unobserved knowledge.
